zh.Kinross, Perth and Kinross, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭培斯 安德 金洛斯金洛斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alexander Barton Steedman於1510年出生在英國蘇格蘭培斯 安德 金洛斯金洛斯時，他的父親Charles Alexander Barton Stedman20歲，母親Susan Stedman20歲。他於1525年之後與Lady Christian Stuart在英國蘇格蘭費伏結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1593年在他的家鄉享年83歲。

nameMeanings.name: Steedman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Steadman
meanings: occupational or topographic name from Middle English stede ‘place, farm, estate’ (Old English stede) + -man, used for someone who lived or worked on a farm, or who lived at a place so named. Compare Stead .
occupational name for someone who worked with horses, from Middle English sted(e) ‘horse, stallion’ (Old English steda) + -man. Compare Steed .

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

nameMeanings.name: Barton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, originally a local name from any of the numerous places in England so called from Old English bere ‘barley’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

en.lifeSummary: When Alexander Barton Steedman was born in 1510, in Kinross, Perth and Kinross, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Charles Alexander Barton Stedman, was 20 and his mother, Susan Stedman, was 20. He married Lady Christian Stuart after 1525, in Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1593, in his hometown, at the age of 83.

Il a épousé Lady Christian Stuart après 1525, à Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1593, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 83 ans.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alexander Barton Steedman родился в 1510 г. в местности кинросс, пирт анд кинросс, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Charles Alexander Barton Stedman было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Susan Stedman, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Christian Stuart после 1525 г. в местности фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1593 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 83 лет.
